title.subtitle: Total number of classified venues by grouped venue type

transform.calculate: indexof(datum.category_lower, 'café') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'cafe') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'coffee') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'breakfast') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'cafeteria') >= 0 ? 'Cafe / Coffee' : indexof(datum.category_lower, 'restaurant') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'ramen') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'thai') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'vietnamese') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'chinese') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'korean') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'japanese') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'dumpling') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'asian') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'malay') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'afghan') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'portuguese') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'steakhouse') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'chaat') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'bbq') >= 0 ? 'Restaurant' : indexof(datum.category_lower, 'pizza') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'burger') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'sandwich') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'fast food') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'food truck') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'kebab') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'fried chicken') >= 0 ? 'Fast food / casual food' : indexof(datum.category_lower, 'dessert') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'ice cream') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'frozen yogurt') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'cupcake') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'juice') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'bubble tea') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'candy') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'bagel') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'creperie') >= 0 ? 'Dessert / drinks' : indexof(datum.category_lower, 'bakery') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'supermarket') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'grocery') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'convenience') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'liquor store') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'big box') >= 0 ? 'Food retail' : indexof(datum.category_lower, 'bar') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'pub') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'beer') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'speakeasy') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'gastropub') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'cocktail') >= 0 ? 'Bars / nightlife' : indexof(datum.category_lower, 'gym') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'yoga') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'fitness') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'pilates') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'pool') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'sports') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'athletics') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'recreation') >= 0 ? 'Fitness / recreation' : indexof(datum.category_lower, 'movie') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'theater') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'theatre') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'mall') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'art') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'museum') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'casino') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'aquarium') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'park') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'bookstore') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'record shop') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'video store') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'plaza') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'social club') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'hobby') >= 0 || indexof(datum.category_lower, 'hotel') >= 0 ?
